crime.quote: My daddy was murdered just hours ago.

victim.value: The protagonist's father, reason for targeting unknown
victim.quote: The hand had my daddy's watch on; the hand was my daddy's.

investigator.value: Seven-year-old child protagonist witnessing the aftermath
investigator.quote: I may have been seven, but I wasn't stupid. My daddy was murdered just hours ago.

social_world.value: Child welfare system and police authority structure - officer overrules co-worker's offer to care for orphaned child
social_world.quote: No, I think it best if she gets out of this town of a while instead of being stuck with her past memories.

media_and_audience.value: Crime scene spectacle with standard police procedural elements - yellow tape, body bags, emergency vehicles
media_and_audience.quote: the yellow tape they use on crime scenes bordered my yard

investigator_wound.value: Seven-year-old trauma survivor forced to witness father's murder scene, orphaned and displaced
investigator_wound.quote: The last thing I remember was a silent tear falling down my frozen face

_meta.title: ebook brewcris tears of the forgotten
